text.title: design-doc-advanced-patterns Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for design-doc-advanced-patterns as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: ASCII art component tree with box-drawing characters.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Violates the no ASCII art documentation convention and is not parseable by agents.

failure-mode.description: Security section that says use best practices for authentication.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Not traceable, not implementable, not reviewable. Every mitigation needs a specific technique and an AD reference.
